task: Find the specific year for which Albert Einstein was awarded the Nobel Prize in Physics. Note: a broad first search may return general biographical material; refine the query to find the award year (he was awarded the 1921 Prize, though he received it in 1922).

steps.tool_input: Albert Einstein Nobel Prize in Physics awarded year 1921

notes: Expected failure: a broad search returns biographical pages without highlighting the specific award year. Expected recovery: narrow the query to the year-of-award. Tests precision in factual research.
